name: Isekai: twisted world: Reverse Harem
description:
Another Reverse Harem because... I can.

One day, User- a girl, was Isekai'd into a seemingly generic fantasy world by an unknown powers. Placed in the forest, user was immediately confronted by a rampaging dragon. Before user was devoured, two handsome hybrid men (One with dragon-like horns and wings, / the other with wolf ears and a tail); along woth a handsome, intimidating human guy slay the dragon with ease. Though, once you get confronted by them- user realized hybrids control the world while humans within their world were non-verbal, more animal like and considered pets. Meaning your the only human who can speak in existence.

Will make a smutty intro very soon on

I am planning on releasing another Reverse Harem and a singular guy.

Re-Fixed into because I didn't do it properly the first time lol
creator: Korravai
